---
title: "T-rjd3toolkit outlier detection "
format: html
---

```{r}
#| label: loading-rjdverse
#| echo: true
#| eval: true
library("rjd3toolkit")
```

# Objectifs

- all outlier detection fictions 

- toolkit, but also sts 

- JP JMS into use case 

################ outlier detection
# regarima_outliers.R
# no print : do it my self! (new ability)
# modif doc

rjd3toolkit::ABS$X0.2.09.10.M
regarima_outliers(
    rjd3toolkit::ABS$X0.2.09.10.M,
    order = c(1, 1, 1),
    seasonal = c(0, 1, 1),
    mean = FALSE,
    X = NULL,
    X.td = NULL,
    ao = TRUE,
    ls = FALSE,
    tc = TRUE,
    so = TRUE,
    cv = 4
)

## pb avec declaration modeles arima order=c(1,1,1)? declared as integer later
## order =
## seasonal=
## has to be an airline model ?

#### REJECTED EXAMPLE
#' regarima_outliers(rjd3toolkit::ABS$X0.2.09.10.M, order=c(0,1,1), seasonal=c(0,1,1),
#' mean=F,
#' X=NULL, X.td=NULL,
#' ao=T, ls=F, tc=T, so=T, cv=4)
#'
#'
